current_status_next_steps:
1. Intialize the zonelet yaml in MON-AZ1
# gt -Z <path>/zonelet.yml

2. Set Variable on deployer
# LOCAL_NODE="mon1-qz1-sr1-rk008-s02-sn1,mon1-qz1-sr1-rk008-s02-sn2";RNODE="mon1-qz1-sr1-rk009-s06-sn2";SG1="46010a0e-d5ca-4a68-b00f-b598a9b23a98";PORT="401d098a-a330-455c-8973-d196061a975a"


3. VALIDATION : 

# gt ${RNODE} "ccc get remote_ports ${PORT} -f "
# gt ${LOCAL_NODE} "ccc get local_ports ${PORT} -f "
# gt ${RNODE} "ccc get  security_group ${SG1} -f| grep ${PORT}"

4. MITIGATION: 

# gt -t 120 ${RNODE} "ccc remove_security_group_members ${SG1} ${PORT}"
# gt -t 120 ${RNODE} "ccc delete_remote_port ${PORT}"

5. RE-VALIDATE 
# gt ${RNODE} "ccc get remote_ports ${PORT} -f "
# gt ${LOCAL_NODE} "ccc get local_ports ${PORT} -f "
# gt ${RNODE} "ccc get  security_group ${SG1} -f| grep ${PORT}"
